summary: Added four subsections to core/state-manager.md: 'Usage Field Capture' (stage lifecycle writes pre/post dispatch, COST-R12 field-name discovery, §4.1 JSON shape), 'Pipeline Accumulator Write' (sum at pipeline end, COST-R10 truncation, §4.2 shape), 'Fixer-Reviewer Cumulative Write' (running total across iterations, no per-iteration array), and 'Backward-Compatible Read' (v6.7.x tolerance, null/0 defaults, schema_version stays 1.0). All existing atomic-write content preserved.
